items.summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:AMD) is one of the 10 Stocks With Double-, Triple-Digit Returns. Advanced Micro Devices climbed by 24.9 percent week-on-week, as investors gobbled up shares following an analyst’s bullish outlook for the company, having raised its price target by 70 percent. On Friday alone, the stock climbed to an all-time high of […]
